'''鈭歷-zh-w''' ('''kavazhaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charade|charade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charade|charade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-zh-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavazhaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivazhaw|thivazhaw]] || [[word:jivazhaw|jivazhaw]] || [[word:shivazhaw|shivazhaw]] || [[word:kivazhaw|kivazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvazhaw|thuthuvazhaw]] || [[word:jujuvazhaw|jujuvazhaw]] || [[word:shushuvazhaw|shushuvazhaw]] || [[word:kukuvazhaw|kukuvazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvazhaw|thuvazhaw]] || [[word:juvazhaw|juvazhaw]] || [[word:shuvazhaw|shuvazhaw]] || [[word:kuvazhaw|kuvazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvazhaw|thuvazhaw]] || [[word:juvazhaw|juvazhaw]] || [[word:shuvazhaw|shuvazhaw]] || [[word:kuvazhaw|kuvazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevazhaw|thevazhaw]] || [[word:jevazhaw|jevazhaw]] || [[word:shevazhaw|shevazhaw]] || [[word:kevazhaw|kevazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovazhaw|thothovazhaw]] || [[word:jojovazhaw|jojovazhaw]] || [[word:shoshovazhaw|shoshovazhaw]] || [[word:kokovazhaw|kokovazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovazhaw|thovazhaw]] || [[word:jovazhaw|jovazhaw]] || [[word:shovazhaw|shovazhaw]] || [[word:kovazhaw|kovazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovazhaw|thovazhaw]] || [[word:jovazhaw|jovazhaw]] || [[word:shovazhaw|shovazhaw]] || [[word:kovazhaw|kovazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vazhaw|th忙vazhaw]] || [[word:j忙vazhaw|j忙vazhaw]] || [[word:sh忙vazhaw|sh忙vazhaw]] || [[word:k忙vazhaw|k忙vazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavazhaw|thathavazhaw]] || [[word:jajavazhaw|jajavazhaw]] || [[word:shashavazhaw|shashavazhaw]] || [[word:kakavazhaw|kakavazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavazhaw|thavazhaw]] || [[word:javazhaw|javazhaw]] || [[word:shavazhaw|shavazhaw]] || [[word:kavazhaw|kavazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavazhaw|thavazhaw]] || [[word:javazhaw|javazhaw]] || [[word:shavazhaw|shavazhaw]] || [[word:kavazhaw|kavazhaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavazhaw|shavazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavazhaw|goshavazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavazhaw|gokishavazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavazhawn眉|shavazhawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkn眉|goshavazhawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavazhawn眉|gokishavazhawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavazhawsh毛|shavazhawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavazhawnksh毛|goshavazhawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavazhawsh毛|gokishavazhawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavazhawro|shavazhawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkro|goshavazhawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavazhawro|gokishavazhawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavazhawmu|shavazhawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkmu|goshavazhawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavazhawmu|gokishavazhawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavazhawsher|shavazhawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavazhawnksher|goshavazhawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavazhawsher|gokishavazhawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavazhawng|shavazhawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkng|goshavazhawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavazhawng|gokishavazhawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavazhawya|shavazhawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkya|goshavazhawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavazhawya|gokishavazhawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavazhawyam|shavazhawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkyam|goshavazhawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavazhawyam|gokishavazhawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavazhawn眉sh毛|shavazhawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkn眉sh毛|goshavazhawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavazhawn眉sh毛|gokishavazhawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavazhawn眉ro|shavazhawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkn眉ro|goshavazhawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavazhawn眉ro|gokishavazhawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavazhawn眉mu|shavazhawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkn眉mu|goshavazhawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavazhawn眉mu|gokishavazhawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavazhawsh毛n眉|shavazhawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavazhawnksh毛n眉|goshavazhawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavazhawsh毛n眉|gokishavazhawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavazhawsh毛ro|shavazhawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavazhawnksh毛ro|goshavazhawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavazhawsh毛ro|gokishavazhawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavazhawsh毛mu|shavazhawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavazhawnksh毛mu|goshavazhawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavazhawsh毛mu|gokishavazhawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavazhawron眉|shavazhawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkron眉|goshavazhawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavazhawron眉|gokishavazhawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavazhawrosh毛|shavazhawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkrosh毛|goshavazhawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavazhawrosh毛|gokishavazhawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavazhawromu|shavazhawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkromu|goshavazhawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavazhawromu|gokishavazhawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavazhawmun眉|shavazhawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkmun眉|goshavazhawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavazhawmun眉|gokishavazhawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavazhawmush毛|shavazhawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkmush毛|goshavazhawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavazhawmush毛|gokishavazhawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavazhawmuro|shavazhawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavazhawnkmuro|goshavazhawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavazhawmuro|gokishavazhawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
